items.body_excerpt:
New: Sixers year-in-review continues today with Quentin Grimes, whose up-and-down season offered more questions than answers.

What is a fair price for Grimes as a free agent? Is it worthwhile for the Sixers to meet it? How clean of a “fit” actually is he?
